title: Reagan Rorschach
compiled_truth: Reagan Rorschach is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-21), Reagan Rorschach sent 130 and received 525 emails, totalling 655 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kay Mann](people/kay-mann) (121), [David Fairley](people/david-fairley) (44), [Lloyd Will](people/lloyd-will) (29), [Kayne Coulter](people/kayne-coulter) (27), [Ozzie Pagan](people/ozzie-pagan) (24).
